metadata.description: Marketplace for gtfs-jp-creator plugin. Contains a single Claude Skill that helps non-experts create GTFS-JP (Japan public transit data v4.0) data from PDFs, Excel sheets, and timetables.

plugins.name: gtfs-jp-creator
plugins.description: Claude Skill for creating, validating, and fixing GTFS-JP static feed data from non-machine-readable sources such as bus timetable PDFs, Excel sheets, or photographed schedules. Designed for non-experts (bus operators, municipal staff, citizens, researchers).
